code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let trimmed = string.trim(line)
let n = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

mut x = n
if x < 0
  x = -x
end

mut sum = 0
if x == 0
  sum = 0
else
  while x > 0
    sum = sum + (x % 10)
    x = x / 10
  end
end

println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
